generated_purpose: Concrete capability contracts for the Execution Reality Engine. status='absent' reflects verified reality: these subsystems are not observable from the current cloud environment (environment boundary, not engineering failure). Freshness thresholds are null (UNKNOWN) until calibrated from VAJRA's real cadence once Windows access is granted.

contracts.description: Continuously captures quotes/trades for the tracked instruments and writes raw observations.

intended_output.artifact: fresh quote+trade observations in raw_observations during session

contracts.healthy_definition: During an active session window, quote/trade observations for every required instrument land in the raw store within max_staleness_seconds, each passing correctness_checks.
failure_signals: no output within max_staleness_seconds during session
contracts.status_evidence: docs/vajra-recovery/CLOUD_REPOSITORY_INVENTORY.md (2026-07-17) + branch/PR scan 2026-07-23: no collector present in observable environment.

contracts.description: Triggers collection/execution tasks on the correct cadence and session calendar.

intended_output.artifact: on-time task invocations aligned to the session calendar

contracts.healthy_definition: Every scheduled task fires within its tolerance window on trading days, and does not fire on holidays/halts.
contracts.status_evidence: Not present in observable environment (same evidence as market_data_collector).

contracts.description: Submits our orders and captures their full lifecycle: ack, partials, fills, rejections, latencies.

intended_output.artifact: order_lifecycle + fill + rejection observations with latency and reference prices

contracts.healthy_definition: Every order our system emits produces a complete, timestamped lifecycle trail with arrival reference prices, enabling slippage/latency/fill measurement.
contracts.status_evidence: Not present in observable environment; also gated on broker/API credentials (Founder-only).

contracts.description: Immutable, append-only, tamper-evident storage of all raw observations.

intended_output.artifact: append-only rows with intact hash chain; no mutations

contracts.healthy_definition: Every accepted observation is persisted immutably; hash chain verifies; invalid records are quarantined not dropped.
contracts.status_evidence: DDL specified (storage/raw_observations.sql) but not yet instantiated against a real store.

contracts.description: Detects stale datasets automatically; distinguishes 'no data because market closed' from 'no data because capability failed'.
contracts.healthy_definition: For each capability, emits FRESH/STALE using its calibrated max_staleness_seconds, suppressed during legitimately closed sessions.
contracts.status_evidence: Depends on calibrated thresholds (UNKNOWN until cadence observed) and on capability_output_log being populated.
